texto: Our destiny is not mapped out for us by some exterior power
autor: we map it out for ourselves. What we think and do in the present determines what shall happen to us in the future.
explicacao: Citação de we map it out for ourselves. What we think and do in the present determines what shall happen to us in the future. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Our destiny is not mapped out for us by some exterior power” articula reflexao, christian-d-larson, destiny em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
